name: ecopet
description: ECOPET — Ecossistema pet inteligente: marketplace, rede social, healthtech e IA

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c green,blue "npm run dev -w @ecopet/web" "npm run dev -w @ecopet/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @ecopet/database && npm run build -w @ecopet/api && npm run build -w @ecopet/web
